scripts.dev: cmd /c "node scripts/gen-firebase-messaging-sw.mjs & node scripts/kill-ports.js 3010 3000 3001 >nul 2>&1 & next dev -p 3010"
scripts.build:fresh: node scripts/ensure-pwa-icons.mjs && node scripts/gen-firebase-messaging-sw.mjs && node scripts/clean-next-all.mjs && next build
scripts.android:prepare: node scripts/ensure-pwa-icons.mjs && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:assets: node scripts/ensure-pwa-icons.mjs && node scripts/sync-android-launcher-icons.mjs && npx cap sync android
scripts.verify: node scripts/ensure-pwa-icons.mjs && node scripts/gen-firebase-messaging-sw.mjs && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.build:win: node scripts/ensure-pwa-icons.mjs && node scripts/gen-firebase-messaging-sw.mjs && set NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-win&& next build
